components.text: The White Jade Orchid gets the Beautiful green hue from growing on Jade Ore.

The White Jade Orchid is a metal element aligned herb that grows by absorbing the Jade Ore's natural Hue!

This herb cleanses curses and demonic qi!

It's possible to eat this raw but using this in a Pill Cauldron will reveal it's true capabilities!

Golden Sun Leaf has a 5% chance of spawning ontop of the Jade Ore 

The White Jade Orchid spawns in all biomes aslong as it's ontop of a Jade Ore 
This Herb is also one of the Common Herbs that can be found!
